title: Leaf Litter
description: Simple mod that adds leaf litter back to older versions
body:
This mod adds leaf liter back to 1.21.1 and older

**Why?**

to decorate ur building with leaves

**How do i get it in survival?**

You need to smelt leaves in a furnace

![Leaf litter recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f22621a1c85e22f4f3e46ad7268d56934db5aa5.png)

works with any leaves

**How do i get it in creative?**

You can find it at the end of the nature tab

**What currently doesnt work:**

World generation - leaf litter cant spawn in the world u have to smelt to obtain it

**Source code:**

[Source](https://github.com/okil6dev/Leaf-Litter-Port)
